song.title: O the Deep Deep Love of Jesus
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) I stand amazed in the presence Of Jesus the Nazarene, And wonder how He could love me, A sinner condemned, unclean.
[C] Chorus How marvelous! How wonderful! And my song shall ever be: How marvelous! How wonderful! Is my Savior’s love for me!
[V2] 2) For me it was in the garden, He prayed: “Not My will, but Thine.” He had no tears for His own griefs, But sweat drops of blood for mine.
[V3] 3) In pity angels beheld Him, And came from the world of light To comfort Him in the sorrows He bore for my soul that night.
[V4] 4) He took my sins and my sorrows, He made them His very own; He bore the burden to Calv’ry, And suffered and died alone.
[V5] 5) When with the ransomed in glory His face I at last shall see, ’Twill be my joy through the ages To sing of His love for me
song.author: Samuel Trevor Francis, Thomas J. Williams
